title: Refactor to server-side rendering
original_text: Refactored client-side rendering to server-side rendering for SEO. Implemented Next.js for SSR. Added server-side data fetching. Implemented static page generation for marketing pages. Added incremental static regeneration. Implemented streaming SSR for faster initial load. Added SEO metadata management. Added tests for SSR functionality. Result: 49 tests pass.
expected_body_lines: - Add streaming SSR and SEO metadata
expected_command: git commit -m "refactor(frontend): migrate to server-side rendering"
